name: What proof do I need for my repetitive strain injury claim in Murray?

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need for my repetitive strain injury claim in Murray?

acceptedAnswer.text: Doctor causation proof, work logs, medical records.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Medical causation linking work to condition, doctor reports, prior records, incident logs.[1][2] Utah covers carpal tunnel etc. if AOE/COE.[1] Key factors: on-premises presumption; refuse nothing. Gather emails, witness statements.[2] Authorized treatment records strengthen.[1]

description: Doctor causation proof, work logs, medical records.[1][2]
